messages.content: I do actually hit blank walls a lot of times but i get by

situation: i used to scare for darkness

evidence: I do actually hit blank walls a lot of times but i get by
interactionPattern.rationale: Single human statement without a clear question or task request; reads as general sharing rather than structured Q&A.

evidence: I do actually hit blank walls a lot of times but i get by
powerDynamics.rationale: Only the human contributes content, so the human sets the (limited) agenda by default.

emotionalTone.rationale: No explicit affect words beyond mild self-assessment; tone is matter-of-fact.

evidence: I do actually hit blank walls a lot of times but i get by
engagementStyle.rationale: No questions, directives, or exploration prompts; just a statement.

evidence: I do actually hit blank walls a lot of times
knowledgeExchange.rationale: Human shares a personal experience/condition (getting stuck) rather than facts or how-to content.

evidence: I do actually hit blank walls a lot of times but i get by
conversationPurpose.rationale: Appears to be expressing a personal struggle without explicitly requesting information or solutions.

evidence: I do actually hit blank walls a lot of times
topicDepth.rationale: Brief, non-elaborated mention of difficulty; no details or follow-up.

evidence: I do actually hit blank walls a lot of times but i get by
turnTaking.rationale: Only the user provides substantive text; assistant turn is empty.

evidence.quote: I do actually hit blank walls a lot of times but i get by

humanRole.rationale: Primary act is personal disclosure about struggling and coping, with no explicit request or instruction.

aiRole.rationale: Assistant provides no content, so role cannot be inferred from evidence; distribution is effectively indeterminate.

metadata.reclassification_reason: Updated from old taxonomy to Social Role Theory
